```cpp
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>

using namespace std;

// Function to generate a complex pattern with numbers
vector<int> generatePattern(int size) {
    vector<int> pattern;
    for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
        pattern.push_back(i);
        pattern.push_back(i * 2);
    }
    return pattern;
}

// Function to display the pattern
void displayPattern(vector<int> pattern) {
    for (int i = 0; i < pattern.size(); ++i) {
        cout << pattern[i] << " ";
        if (i % 2 == 1) {
            cout << endl;
        }
    }
}

// Function to check if a number is prime
bool isPrime(int n) {
    if (n < 2) return false;
    for (int i = 2; i <= sqrt(n); ++i) {
        if (n % i == 0) return false;
    }
    return true;
}

// Main function
int main() {
    int size = 10;
    vector<int> pattern = generatePattern(size);
    displayPattern(pattern);
    return 0;
}
```
